description: We performed a log-log regression on k=2..10 as requested, but the scaling exponent is -5.83 with R²=0.994 (as stated in the data section), not -3.5. The fitted scaling law and regression coefficient are based on the presented densities and are numerically specified.
action_taken: We performed a log-log regression on k=2..10 as requested, but the scaling exponent is -5.83 with R²=0.994 (as stated in the data section), not -3.5. The fitted scaling law and regression coefficient are based on the presented densities and are numerically specified.
